channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: ossu/computer-science
item.description: 🎓 Path to a free self-taught education in Computer Science!

item.title: wtsxDev/reverse-engineering
item.description: List of awesome reverse engineering resources

item.title: laynH/Anime-Girls-Holding-Programming-Books
item.description: Anime Girls Holding Programming Books

item.title: youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
item.description: LeetCode 刷题攻略：200道经典题目刷题顺序，共60w字的详细图解，视频难点剖析，50余张思维导图，从此算法学习不再迷茫！🔥🔥 来看看，你会发现相见恨晚！🚀

item.title: tobetz/LegoMicroscope
item.description: To learn about optics and microscopy, we generated a simple to build lego microscope that does not need precision optics and 3D printed parts.

item.title: shashank88/system_design
item.description: Preparation links and resources for system design questions

item.title: iCSToCS/CSBook
item.description: 计算机类常用电子书整理，并且附带下载链接，包括Java，Python，Linux，Go，C，C++，数据结构与算法，人工智能，计算机基础，面试，设计模式，数据库，前端等书籍

item.title: itdevbooks/pdf
item.description: 编程电子书，电子书，编程书籍，包括C，C#，Docker，Elasticsearch，Git，Hadoop，HeadFirst，Java，Javascript，jvm，Kafka，Linux，Maven，MongoDB，MyBatis，MySQL，Netty，Nginx，Python，RabbitMQ，Redis，Scala，Solr，Spark，Spring，SpringBoot，SpringCloud，TCPIP，Tomcat，Zookeeper，人工智能，大数据类，并发编程，数据库类，数据挖掘，新面试题，架构设计，算法系列，计算机类，设计模式，软件测试，重构优化，等更多分类

item.title: SharingSource/LogicStack-LeetCode
item.description: 公众号「宫水三叶的刷题日记」刷穿 LeetCode 系列文章源码

item.title: danistefanovic/build-your-own-x
item.description: 🤓 Build your own (insert technology here)

item.title: rockerBOO/awesome-neovim
item.description: Collections of awesome neovim plugins.

item.title: ffffffff0x/Digital-Privacy
item.description: 一个关于数字隐私搜集、保护、清理集一体的方案,外加开源信息收集(OSINT)对抗

item.title: LaresLLC/CVE-2021-1675
item.description: CVE-2021-1675 Detection Info

item.title: mqyqingfeng/Blog
item.description: 冴羽写博客的地方，预计写四个系列：JavaScript深入系列、JavaScript专题系列、ES6系列、React系列。

item.description: 📚 List of awesome university courses for learning Computer Science!

item.description: 提供计算机考研和软件工程考研专业的各个学校 考研真题

item.description: 955 不加班的公司名单 - 工作 955，work–life balance (工作与生活的平衡)

item.title: Allar/ue5-style-guide
item.description: An attempt to make Unreal Engine 4 projects more consistent

item.title: sundowndev/hacker-roadmap
item.description: 📌 Your beginner pen-testing start guide. A guide for amateur pen testers and a collection of hacking tools, resources and references to practice ethical hacking and web security.

item.title: Alvin9999/new-pac
item.description: 科学上网/自由上网/翻墙/软件/方法，一键翻墙浏览器，免费shadowsocks/ss/ssr/v2ray/goflyway账号/节点分享，vps一键搭建脚本/教程

item.description: GPT-3: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners

item.title: souyunku/DevBooks
item.description: 2021面试题，Java面试题、JVM面试题、多线程面试题、并发编程、设计模式面试题、SpringBoot面试题、SpringCloud面试题、MyBatis面试题、ZooKeepe面试题r、Dubbo面试题、Elasticsearch面试题、Memcached面试题、MongoDB面试题、Redis面试题、MySQL面试题、RabbitMQ面试题、Kafka面试题、Linux面试题、Netty面试题、Tomcat面试题、Python面试题
